channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Rivage adds PS5 and Xbox Series versions; PC demo now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Offers approximately one hour of gameplay.

Science-fiction puzzle adventure game Rivage will launch for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series alongside its previously announced PC (Steam) version, publisher Raw Fury and developer Exnilo Studio announced. The PC version will also be available via Microsoft Store. A demo is now available for PC via Steam.

Here is an overview of the demo, via its Steam page:

Welcome to the Rivage demo!

This demo offers approximately one hour of gameplay, letting you explore the first sections of the A.R.E.S. station and get a taste of its puzzles and atmosphere.

Please note that your savegame from the demo will not carry over to the full game. As the demo is a customized version of the game this is not possible. Thank you for your understanding and enjoy your time aboard!

In the 25th century, humanity has been forced to expand beyond its solar system. Among the stars, the planet VESTA is discovered, a world that may hold the promise of a new home. To study it, the A.R.E.S. space station is launched into orbit to analyze its potential. But when the station, and the crew, was caught up in a space phenomenon, calamity struck…

You play as Miranda, who awakens alone aboard the station trapped in a strange phenomenon. With clues of the past echoing through the world: an object out of place, a door newly unlocked, a message left behind almost as if the station itself challenges you. To survive, Miranda must rely on her mind, solving intricate puzzles, experimenting with strange objects, and piecing together the truth behind what happened to her crew and the station itself.

As Miranda unravels the mystery, one truth becomes clear: progress always has a cost. Rivage is an atmospheric science-fiction puzzle adventure that blends exploration, logic, and narrative discovery into a deeply beautiful experience, where each step brings you closer to escape.

Key Features

  • Immersive World – Step aboard the A.R.E.S. station, a meticulously detailed, fully interactable environment where every item tells a story. Examine artifacts, analyze research data, and uncover hidden notes scattered across abandoned workstations.
  • Captivating Storyline – The station was once home to a crew, each with their own goals, fears, and philosophies. Now, only fragments of their lives remain: journals, personal logs, and encrypted messages scattered throughout the station. Piece together their relationships, uncover the emotional toll of isolation, and experience a narrative that weaves scientific mystery with human vulnerability.
  • Unravel the Mystery – Every puzzle in Rivage is woven into the fabric of the story. You’ll repair broken systems, realign malfunctioning mechanisms, and solve environmental challenges that play with gravity, magnetism, and the very flow of time.
  • The K9 System – With the K9 System, Miranda can log discoveries and retain certain puzzle solutions, allowing players to focus on what truly matters; uncovering the truth behind the distortions that have consumed the station. This balance keeps gameplay engaging, rewarding cleverness and persistence over repetition.

Watch a new trailer below.

Story Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/rivage-adds-ps5-and-xbox-series-versions-pc-demo-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wall World Strategy announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Alawar has announced Wall World Strategy, a fusion of 3D colony simulation and survival / tower defense real-time strategy combat game. It will launch for PC via Steam this fall. An open playtest is currently live.

Here is an overview of the game, via Alawar:

About

Build and lead a colony on the surface of an endless Wall. Manage resources and your people, develop new technologies, defend against relentless zyrex attacks, and send robo-spiders on risky expeditions. Keep the colony from collapsing—in Wall World, it’s easy to fall.

The Wall is a colossal structure stretching far beyond the visible horizon, hiding traces of ancient eras and unexplained phenomena within its depths. Here, among stone, metal, and darkness, humanity has been forced to build a new life—clinging to the Wall and trying to survive in a world full of threats and mysteries.

Wall World Strategy is a colony sim on a sheer vertical surface, where every decision affects the stability of the system. Build and expand your base, gather resources, take care of your people, strengthen your defenses, and send expeditions into distant regions and unexplored depths. Each new step forward brings not only opportunities for growth but also new dangers. Survival depends on your foresight, your ability to manage limited resources, and your willingness to make difficult decisions.

Build and Expand the Colony

Establish a base on the surface of the Endless Wall and gradually turn a small outpost into a large, stable, and well-defended colony. Plan the placement of key structures, develop production chains, expand living areas, and build infrastructure capable of supporting both population growth and stable operations.

As your colony grows, you will need to decide how to expand, which structures to prioritize, and where to allocate resources—whether into production, housing, or defense.

Withstand the Threats

The Wall is far from lifeless. In its shadows lurk zyrexes—dangerous creatures that will attack your colony again and again, testing its defenses, organization, and your ability to respond. Strengthen your defenses, secure vulnerable areas, and decide how much you can afford to invest in protection.

Additional pressure comes from emergency events such as accidents, disasters, and environmental hazards. They won’t destroy your colony instantly, but they will disrupt its operations and trigger cascading problems.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Manage Your Society

Your colony is, above all, made up of people—living, working, hoping for the future, and depending on your decisions. Monitor their condition and take into account how they react to your choices. Overpopulation, food shortages, or supply disruptions can quickly lead to declining efficiency, crisis, and riots.

Caring for your people is a core part of the strategy. The state of your population determines the performance of the entire colony—its productivity and its ability to endure prolonged periods of danger. A strong and well-supported society recovers faster from attacks and moves forward with greater confidence.

Gather Resources and Advance

Start with basic resource extraction and gradually build a more complex economy. Explore the depths of the Wall, search for stable resource deposits, and develop the infrastructure needed to use them efficiently.

Technological progress allows you to improve core systems and unlock new possibilities. Enhance resource gathering and processing, reduce costs, increase efficiency, and strengthen your colony against external threats. Some technologies accelerate infrastructure development, others improve defense, automate key processes, or expand your ability to explore new areas of the Wall.

Send Out Expeditions

To explore beyond your colony, deploy robo-spiders—specialized machines designed for scouting, resource extraction, and operations in remote areas. Send them into uncharted sectors of the Wall to expand your reach, gather resources, uncover rare discoveries, and explore areas that are too dangerous or inaccessible for humans.

However, distant regions bring not only opportunities but also risks. Expeditions may encounter hostile environments, unstable terrain, unknown lifeforms, or remnants of ancient machinery whose purpose has long been forgotten. Prepare your equipment, assess the risks, and decide how far you’re willing to go.

Explore the World of the Wall

The Wall is more than just the surface your colony clings to. Beneath it lies an entire world filled with resources, forgotten technologies, and rare artifacts. Extract valuable materials, recover technological samples that can accelerate your development, and uncover unique objects that help you understand this world.

As you explore, you will begin to find answers—but each discovery raises new questions about the nature of the Wall and why it became humanity’s last refuge.

Watch the announcement teaser trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/wall-world-strategy-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Hotel Architect launches May 14
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Currently in Early Access.

Hotel construction and management simulation game Hotel Architect will leave Early Access and launch for PC via Steam on May 14 for $29.99 / £24.99 / €29.99, publisher Wired Productions and developer Pathos Interactive announced.

Hotel Architect first launched in Early Access on May 20, 2025.

Here is an overview of version 1.0 release, via Wired Productions:

After a standout Early Access run and a steady flow of major updates, Hotel Architect is ready for its grand opening. The full 1.0 release arrives on May 14, one year after entering early access, and brings a wave of player-requested additions, including Custom Sandbox mode, two new locations and gameplay improvements across the experience.

Built in close collaboration with its growing community, Hotel Architect now stands as one of the highest rated hotel tycoon games on Steam, giving players more control, more creativity, and more ways to run their dream hotel, whether that means crafting a five-star masterpiece or barely holding things together during peak check-in chaos.

Since entering Early Access, Hotel Architect has grown into one of Steam’s most detailed and player-driven hotel tycoon and management sims. The full release builds on that foundation with a wide range of new features and improvements. The 1.0 launch introduces:

  • Custom Sandbox Mode – Offering players a wider range of creative freedom to design, build and manage their own hotels, with the option to set a buildable area and maximum floor cap.
  • Expansion to the Scenario Mode – Adding the ability for players to create their very own scenarios, with new difficulty options.
  • Two New Locations – Expanding the hospitality empire to the Black Forest, Germany and London, United Kingdom.
  • Couples System – Guests aren’t arriving alone anymore!
  • Expanded Systems and Improvements – A wide range of balancing updates, additional languages, and quality-of-life improvements across the entire experience.

In addition to the new content, Hotel Architect already offers a deep and flexible management experience. With the addition of two brand new locations in 1.0 players can now build across a total of eight unique destinations, including Gothenburg, Santorini, Paris, St. Anton, New York, and Las Vegas. Across these destinations, players unlock rewards by completing main and bonus objectives, cater to a variety of guest types with unique requirements, and manage diverse staff roles – each with their own strengths and weaknesses that directly impact hotel operations. With numerous zones to design and decorate across multiple floors, Hotel Architect delivers a deep, flexible, and highly creative simulation from the ground up.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/hotel-architect-launches-may-14
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Causal Loop launches April 23 for PS5, Xbox Series, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

"Mind-bending" narrative puzzle game dated.

Causal Loop, a narrative puzzle game that blends “mind-bending mechanics” with a science-fiction story about time, consequence, and survival, will launch for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG on April 23, publisher Headup and developer Mirebound Interactive announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

What if every decision you made left behind an echo – an imprint of your past actions, repeating endlessly? In Causal Loop, players don’t just solve puzzles—they navigate a fractured reality that is both their greatest tool and their greatest threat.

In Causal Loop the exo-archaeologist Bale arrives on the long-forgotten alien planet Tor-Ulsat with his colleague Jen, an exo-linguist, to study the ruins of the lost civilization of the Tor—Only to become trapped within a colossal causality loop that fractures reality itself.

With no way to contact mission control and only his companion Walter to help him, Bale must navigate countless obstacles, unravel the fate of the Tor, and outwit the cryptic and mysterious forces that oppose him. As reality unravels and the truth remains buried in the ruins, Bale’s only hope is to solve the mystery of the Tor—before he’s lost to the loop forever.

Key Features

  • Mind-Bending Puzzles – Record, re-record, and replay. Use the signature ‘Echo Branching’ mechanic to record your actions and engage with up to three echoes of your past self. Harness these duplicates to master ancient alien systems that once seemed impossible to navigate.
  • A Mysterious Alien World – Explore beautiful environments through fifteen hand-crafted chapters filled with secrets that will allow you to unravel the mystery of this strange alien planet.
  • An Emotional Journey – Explore a mysterious alien world through the lens of an emotional and thought-provoking story, where puzzles seamlessly drive the narrative forward, complemented by cinematic storytelling
  • Fully Voiced Characters – Every character is brought to life by a talented voice cast delivering high-quality performances in both English and German.
  • A Focus on Accessibility – To ensure all players can enjoy the game, Causal Loop includes accessibility options such as motion sickness prevention, color blindness mode, advanced control mapping, and many more.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/causal-loop-launches-april-23-for-ps5-xbox-series-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Kitaria Fables 2 announced for PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

Another adventure in the magical world of Kitaria.

Publisher PQube and developers Secret Level Studios and Twin Hearts have announced Kitaria Fables 2, an action RPG sequel to the 2021-released Kitaria Fables. It will be available for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, and PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via PQube:

About

Set after the events of 2021’s Kitaria Fables, the highly anticipated sequel follows two new heroes, the ambitious Royal Army “Pathfinder” Alice Skylar and plucky local guide Dusty Tuftkin, on an intrepid adventure across the mysterious new Arkadera Peninsula region. Players will develop unique combat skills for each character, gather precious materials, and forge powerful items, all while tending to their growing farm – either alone or together with friends via online-play or couch cooperative play.

Evolving from the previous game, Kitaria Fables 2 features a new unfixed camera offering a greater view of the world, reduced grinding with the introduction of larger environments, better fast travel and experienced-based levelling, alongside deeper farming with more crops to grow and a farmstead to rebuild to create a more immersive adventure for players.

Across the great expanse of the Endless Ocean lies the Arkadera Peninsula, a distant region that once marked the western edge of the Empire. As the years passed and the Empire’s presence began to fade, the outposts that once protected Arkadera’s citizens were gradually reclaimed by nature, leaving behind a small community to take refuge in the walled haven of Whitewall Town.

Eager to prove their skills in the field, ambitious Royal Army “Pathfinder” Alice Skylar and plucky local guide Dusty Tuftkin join up with the Royal Academy Expedition Team on its mission to reopen Whitewall Town’s fabled errand house, explore the wide peninsula, and restore the long-forgotten outposts.

But as the expedition journeys farther into the north, rumors of a mysterious figure deep within the wilderness slowly begin to surface…

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Into the Wilds – Explore the uncharted Arkadera wilderness and repair the outposts scattered across its deep forests, boggy marshes, rugged highlands and snow-capped mountains.
  • New Heroes Rise – Play as Royal Army “Pathfinder” Alice Skylar, and enthusiastic local guide Dusty Tuftkin, each with their own playstyle to enjoy, skill tree to develop, and story to share.
  • Official Business – Assist the Royal Academy Expedition Team while getting to know your neighbors. Complete fun side quests and seek out remote settlements to earn rare rewards.
  • Spells and Swords – Collect and spend skill points to unlock powerful special attacks and elemental spells. Unleash Alice’s and Dusty’s full potential with devastating ultimate abilities!
  • Getting Crafty – Gather valuable materials in the wilds, and visit Whitewall Town’s skilled artisans to craft and upgrade new equipment, blend potions, or rustle up delicious treats.
  • The Simple Life – Help Aunt Kiki restore her disheveled farmstead to its former glory. Search for rare plant seeds and cultivate nutritious crops before expanding your facilities to turn a profit.
  • Play Together – Recruit a friend in local or online cooperative play, and play through the entire story with both heroes at the same time. Work together with your partner to overcome the toughest challenges!

Watch a new trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/kitaria-fables-2-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series-switch-2-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Northgard Battlegrounds announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Combining city-building strategy, auto-battler mechanics, and asynchronous PvP.

Publisher Shiro Unlimited and Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor developer Funday Games have announced Northgard Battlegrounds for PC (Steam). It will launch in 2026.

Here is an overview of teh game, via its Steam page:

About

A city-building auto-battler set in the Viking world of Northgard, where every building you place shapes your clan’s fate. Develop your village, claim the Gods’ blessings, and send your warband to battle against rival players! Every move counts, only one clan will stand.

Only One Clan Will Stand

Choose one of the renowned clans of Northgard and raise your Townhall on empty lands! Build and expand your settlement, shape your strategy, harness the Gods’ favor, and prepare your warband for the battles to come. Face rival players through asynchronous battles, where your clan will challenge others and defend its own strength. Only the most cunning Warchiefs will lead their clan to glory.

Build Your Settlement

Shape your village with strategic precision. Each turn, decide how your settlement evolves. Place new buildings, gather resources, and develop your economy while forging synergies between your structures and your warband.

Your settlement’s layout is your greatest weapon. Construct economic buildings near resources to boost their production, raise military structures to recruit warriors, and build mythical sites to unleash powerful creatures on the battlefield! In Northgard Battlegrounds, every placement shapes your clan’s strength in combat. Plan wisely, your warriors will reap the benefits when the battle begins.

Claim the Gods’ Blessings

The Old Gods still watch over Northgard, and their blessings can reshape the fate of your clan. Choose divine powers that influence your strategy and transform the way your settlement and warband interact.

Combine blessings with your village layout and unlock powerful synergies that strengthen your path to domination. As fate shifts with each new choice, adapt your strategy and refine your build. No two runs unfold the same way, and every blessing brings new ways to empower your warband before the horns sound.

Send Your Warband Into Battle

At the end of each round, the clans are ready to fight. Warbands clash in dynamic auto-battles where your strategy unfolds before your eyes. Your settlement layout, your blessings, and every decision you made now reveal their true impact on the battlefield.

You command the strategy, your warriors fight for glory. Strengthen your warband, defeat rival clans and the creatures of Northgard, and prove that your clan deserves to rule the battlegrounds! Because in the end, only one clan will stand.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/northgard-battlegrounds-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: HUNTDOWN: OVERTIME launches in Early Access on May 7
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Huntdown "grindhouse roguelite prequel" dated.

HUNTDOWN: OVERTIME, the “grindhouse roguelite prequel” to the action shooter Huntdown, will launch launch in Early Access for PC via Steam on May 7, Coffee Stain Publishing and developer Easy Trigger Studios announced.

The Early Access release will ship with the core systems in place, with no intentions to drastically alter the gameplay. Content such as weapons, character upgrades, and gameplay systems are in a “near-final” state. The full release will feature a richer world with more content and polish, but there is no plan for “substantial changes in the core systems or to overhaul what is already built.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Coffee Stain Publishing:

About

Corporations turned crime-infested streets into profit margins for bounty hunters and John Sawyer is going to make a killing. Hunt, die, upgrade, repeat in this explosive roguelite prequel where every strategic upgrade strips away more flesh and builds a cybernetic fighter one chrome limb at a time.

Combat and Runs: Die Hard, Hunt Harder

Fast, violent run-and-gun action ripped straight from VHS-era blockbusters. Tight controls meet brutal firefights in a roguelite loop designed for pure adrenaline. Collect bounties and survive as long as you can. When you finally go down, Tony drags you back to his operating table and rebuilds you stronger.

Every run pushes you deeper into dangerous gang turf—from neon-soaked city streets to desolate wastelands. Choose your path, lock in on your targets, and adapt on the fly. Each death teaches you the patterns, each resurrection makes you deadlier. This is John Sawyer’s origin story: the transformation from man to cybernetic legend.

Weapons and Upgrades: Build the Perfect Killer

Crank up the heat with a powerful arsenal of firearms, melee weapons and tactical gear. And if heat isn’t your thing, go for a cryomod and let an electric baton do the rest.

Discover cybernetic upgrades and weapon licenses buried in enemy territory. Make your upgrades permanent by unlocking them between runs and reshape how Sawyer fights. Reinforced limbs and experimental combat mods—hundreds of combinations to forge Sawyer into the killing machine that fits your style.

Each run offers fresh opportunities. Bank your earnings, invest in permanent enhancements, then jump back in with new capabilities. Adapt your approach: go loud with heavy firepower or slice through with bladed brutality. The city’s scum won’t know what hit them.

Handcrafted Pixel Art Visuals

Meticulous pixel art meets modern lighting in a stunning collision of retro craft and contemporary technique. This is pure early-80s B-movie aesthetics—bold reds on deep black and explosive contrasts. No pretty neon nostalgia, just VHS-era swagger.

Welcome to the grindhouse. Welcome to Overtime.

Watch a new set of trailers below.

Early Access Release Date Trailer

Gameplay Overview Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/huntdown-overtime-launches-in-early-access-on-may-7
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Second Stone – Galaxies Spring 2026 trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Action RPG published by Headup Games.

Publisher Headup Games and developer Skyward Entertainment have released a new trailer for action RPG Second Stone as part of today’s Galaxies Spring 2026 showcase.

Here is an overview of the game, via Skyward Entertainment:

About

Second Stone: The Legend of the Hidden World is a vibrant action RPG following young Shiren as he searches for his lost spirit guardian, combining fast and fluid movement while mastering powerful magic to battle through two fractured worlds on the brink of collision.

Key Features

  • High-Mobility Action–RPG Combat – Master fast-paced combat defined by dynamic movement, fluid platforming, and environmental puzzles that keep the action evolving.
  • Modular Build Customization – Express your creativity by fusing elemental stones to craft unique powers, then slot them into your gear to design a combat style entirely your own.
  • Bustling Village Hub – Return to a lively home base to upgrade your gear, chat with locals for quests, and unwind with a dice-battler minigame.
  • Exploration and Survival – Navigate a vibrant overworld and its perilous dark mirror state, hunting for rare artifacts to increase your strength and survive the secrets hidden within both realms.
  • Ever-Changing Labyrinth Dungeons – Enter procedural, rogue-like gauntlets that offer fresh layouts and repeatable challenges for those seeking the rarest rewards.

Second Stone will be available for PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG. A release date has yet to be announced.

Watch the trailer below.

Galaxies Spring 2026 Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/second-stone-galaxies-spring-2026-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Scramble Knights Royale open beta test now available
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Playable until April 23.

An open beta test for 32-player classic-adventure battle royale Scramble Knights Royale is now available for PC via Steam until April 23, developer Funktronic Labs announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Funktronic Labs:

About

Welcome to Scramble Knights Royale! Compete against fellow knights in a 32-player classic-adventure battle royale. Be the last knight standing and win the favor of the princess!

Jump off the starting boat and sail on the back of a turtle towards the shore to begin your journey at the start of a new match.

Explore and Discover

Traverse an archipelago filled with life, puzzles, dungeons, and treasures! Every run is a unique adventure. Prepare by finding loot and completing quests as the ring closes to force every knight closer together.

Power Fantasy

Grow stronger with new weapons, armor, and accessories that you discover or purchase. Visit a blacksmith to spend your gems and upgrade your gear. Make strategic equipment choices to create powerful builds.

Scramble It Out

When you’re face to face with another knight, you’ll need to out-skill them in strategic combat with the build you forged. Every weapon has tons of different moves to master and the world is filled with fun environments to brawl in.

Key Features

  • Homestead – Your home away from battle, decorate it with items as you progress and relax with your friends!
  • Get Your Drip – Tons of customization options you earn from playing during different seasons.
  • Play Together – Queue together in free-for-all, or team up when we launch duo queue later this year.
  • Online Split-Screen – Play together in local cooperative split-screen online! Now you just need a friend to play with!
  • Cluck Around and Find Out – If you die, you can watch the rest of the match as a chicken.

Scramble Knights Royale is due out for Xbox Series and PC via Steam and Microsoft Store in 2026.

Watch a new trailer below.

Beta Test Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/scramble-knights-royale-open-beta-test-now-available
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Prime Monster launches May 4
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Political roguelike deckbuilder dated.

Political roguelike deckbuilder Prime Monster will launch for PC via Steam on May 4, publisher Rekoup, and publisher and developer Cavalier Game Studios announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

A card-based political roguelike about surviving in a parliament of literal monsters. Fight for votes, break rules, weather scandals and force through absurd laws to keep the top job in this democratic dystopia of truly monstrous proportions.

In the Fractured Kingdom, politicians really are monsters.

Whether it’s the Vampires ensuring that the population have the calorie content of their blood tattooed on their necks, or the Zombies implementing speed limits on walking—the nation suffers just the same.

It’s time for CHANGE.

Because once YOU become Prime Monster, the nation will suffer in NEW and EXCITING ways!

Key Features

  • Win Votes—By Any Means – In the parliament of the Fractured Kingdom, rational argument is not required! You can bully, blackmail, threaten and commit grievous bodily harm in order to win votes. And that’s just on the members of your own party!
  • Pass Terrible Laws – Release the Nosferatu Files? Decriminalize arson? Allow Same Hex Marriage? Finally—you’re in charge and can enact your appalling policy agenda on a weary nation!
  • Make Bad Decisions – Whether it’s doubling-down on your problematic past social media posts, accepting free samples from an arms dealer or tear-gassing your own housekeeper—you’re the boss and you do things YOUR WAY.
  • Fight Horrible Politicians – 30 reprehensible representatives from 15 political parties are ready and waiting to savage your ideas, policies and personal appearance!
  • Exploit Every Opportunity – Every card is a choice—you can either play it for the effect (how conventional!) or you can do as any good politician does and seek to exploit it for Political Capital, which allows you to deploy your powerful personal Tactics.
  • Choose Your Monster – Are you a political bruiser, a slimy bastard or an irredeemable bungler? Play as all three of these classic political archetypes in the form of Chopper Badstone of Orcs-4-U, Viscount Sucksworth of Vampiric Victory or Rotilda De Cay of The Zombified People’s Movement.
  • Balance Impossible Demands – The public wants things you can’t afford, your party wants things you can’t achieve and opponents just want you dead. To hold on to power you’ll have to somehow maintain your personal authority, political capital, poll rating and cash. Good luck!
  • Ignore the Rules – All debates should be bound by respect and decorum, right? Wrong! Here if you don’t like what your opponent is saying, you can simply have them killed. Just make sure the Shrieker of the House doesn’t catch you!
  • Make Crazy Promises – Ramp up the difficulty by making ridiculous pledges to a gullible electorate in a misguided attempt to secure a legacy!
  • Resign in Disgrace – Has your political career been like watching a clown run across a minefield—except not funny? Has your party lost faith in you? Steal the initiative by resigning like the hopeless failure you are!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/prime-monster-launches-may-4
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Swan Song launches June 4
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Emotional puzzle game dated.

Emotional puzzle game Swan Song will launch for PC via Steam on June 4, developer Business Goose Games announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Swan Song is a cozy and emotional puzzle game where music guides your journey. Use notes of different shapes and sizes to program a music box and solve each puzzle. Help the swan reach the exit as you uncover a touching story of family, loss, and grief.

How Does It Work?

Each puzzle is a piece of music waiting to be written. Place musical notes on your scale—their position determines which platforms activate when the melody plays. Once you’ve composed your solution, turn the key and let the music guide the swan through the level.

Perfect timing and thoughtful placement are the keys to success. Between puzzles, a touching narrative slowly unfolds—revealing the story of the music box’s creator and the family it was made for.

The Story

You discover an old, mysterious music box filled with personal artifacts. This was the creator’s final masterpiece—his “swan song”—lovingly crafted as a tribute to his family.

With every puzzle you solve, fragments of his story come to light. What happened to the family? What secrets does the box hold? Let the music lead you through a story of grief, memories, and regret.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/swan-song-launches-june-4
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Fast-paced precision speedrunner Echobreaker announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
Publisher Weekend Games and Hellboy: Web of Wyrd developer Upstream Arcade have announced fast-paced precision speedrunner Echobreaker. It will launch for PC via Steam in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via Weekend Games:

About

As the pilot of a heavily armored combat rig, the directive from your employers, TDS Industries, is simple: complete each test course in the fastest time possible. Put your health on the line and maneuver through each level of this neon-drenched science facility to set record times against other players on Echobreaker‘s global leaderboard.

Each level is punishing and comes with huge pressure, designed to simulate real combat conditions. That includes enemies, who can be taken down and taken out to gain explosive bursts of speed. Or, solve each course like a high-speed puzzle, navigating difficult and risky routes in order to shave precious seconds off of your final time.

The powerful yet volatile Temporal Echo Drive that your rig is equipped with also allows you to enter Echo State as you slow time and succeed at difficult landings. Complete with time-bending power-ups and double-jumps, you’ll need to use everything to your advantage.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Find Your Perfect Line – Test your reflexes and hone your rig mastery. Fracture and manipulate time itself to boost your top speed.
  • Can You Become Number One? – Compete against other players on the global leaderboard, show off your badges to friends or simply compete with your ghost as you try to break both personal and world records across each of the 15 tracks.
  • Flow State Focus – Step into a science-fiction world drenched in gorgeous neon color, where every track is something to be solved and mastered.

Watch a new trailer below. View a set of screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/fast-paced-precision-speedrunner-echobreaker-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Task Time now available in Early Access
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Gameshow-inspired competitive party game.

Multiplayer party game Task Time is now available in Early Access for PC via Steam and Microsoft Store, publisher Wired Productions and developer ReadGraves announced. It is completely free to play for the first 48 hours as a limited-time celebration.

The Early Access version launches with a PEAK crossover, letting players unlock the “Bing Bong” character as cosmetics in-game.

“We didn’t want a traditional launch,” said Wired Productions co-founder and managing director Leo Zullo in a press release. “Task Time is built on surprise, chaos, and pure mayhem, so it made sense to launch it the same way. Dropping it live and making it free for 48 hours gives players the perfect excuse to jump in, grab some friends, and start ruining relationships immediately.”

ReadGraves creator Sam Read-Graves added, “We encourage players to embrace the jank, if only because we’ve made no serious attempt to remove it. The game works best when you meet it halfway.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Wired Productions:

Task Time is a gameshow-inspired competitive party game where eight friends dive headfirst into six rounds of unpredictable tasks and physics-fueled chaos, to finish top of the leaderboard. From (some of) the people who worked on Gang Beasts and Fall Guys, this is your new favorite friendslop.

Charge into unbridled mayhem, completing unhinged tasks that let you shrink your friends, steal all their stuff, and then watch them fall into lava! You might win or you might completely flop, but hey, there (probably) won’t be any real-life consequences. Of course, nothing is fair, but that’s exactly the point.

Task Time is easy to pick up, impossible to master, and way too much fun to put down. With half a million randomized tasks, no two rounds ever play out the same. So, even the clumsiest player can pull off an absurd and glorious comeback.

Whether you embrace sabotage, survival, or pure mischief, Task Time promises non-stop hilarious moments that test your friendships and maybe even your sanity!

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Launch Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/task-time-now-available-in-early-access
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
